name: Premier Air Charter Holdings Inc.
business: Premier provides luxury private jet charter services, aircraft management, and sales to an international community of aviation enthusiasts. The company operates a fleet of light jets, turbojets, and mid-large jets, and specializes in bespoke aviation solutions.

tamClaims.claim: The jet air charter services market size is estimated to be $13.65 billion with an average compound annual growth rate of 7.84%.
tamClaims.sentence: The jet air charter services market size is estimated to be $13.65 billion with an average compound annual growth rate of 7.84% according to a 2025 report entitled Private Jet Charter Services Market Analysis - Industry Growth, Size & Forecast Report (2025-2030) by Mordor Intelligence (https://www.mordorintelligence.com/industry-reports/private-jet-charter-services-market).
